title: Morph Tweaked
description: A fork of iChun's Morph mod, which locks morphing behind a command
body:
This is a fork of the original [Morph mod by iChun](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/morph).

The ability to morph is not enabled by default in Morph Tweaked; instead, this mod supplies a command that can toggle the ability on and off.


```
/morph enable [player]

/morph disable [player]
```


Removing a player's ability to morph does not remove their previously acquired morphs; if they regain the ability, all of their old morphs will still be there.

This version is intended for modpack makers, who can activate these commands silently to keep morphing gated behind quests or other triggers.



Bug Fixes:

* Fixed the whitelist setting not preventing players from morphing



Future Plans:

* Prevent players from using items, armor, or weapons while morphed
